summary: Phase 2.3 Checkpoint 3 (Frontend + E2E) governance review — backend governance API smoke (6/6 PASS) + frontend Playwright E2E across all C3 surfaces (RevisionTimeline, ScenariosPanel, ScenarioComparator, DecisionsTab, NudgeBanner, NewVersionModal). All five locked decisions (A-E), F1-F5, G1-G6 and SOTA hooks (S1-S10) verified live against the public preview URL. Build is GREEN — no critical issues. Two minor observations + one peripheral 401 noted below.

minor.issue: Detail GET response has 'state'=null while POST submit/approve responses use 'status'=Approved — frontend reads state via the latter; harmless inconsistency but worth aligning.

integration_issues.issue: Console 401 from a peripheral API call (likely notifications/feed) — does NOT block NudgeBanner or governance flows. Investigate by inspecting Network tab.

design_issues.screen: DecisionsTab empty state on Draft v1
issues: Empty state copy 'Approve the appraisal first, then log Go/No-Go.' is shown WHILE the log-decision form is also rendered alongside (because is_current=true). Slight mixed-message UX: form invites entry yet the empty-state next to it says approve first.
With only v1 (no new-version yet) the component renders BOTH an empty-state and an empty timeline container — locator returns count=2. Verify single render path.

verified_scenarios_C3.tabs_7_on_base: PASS — tab-header / tab-units / tab-costs / tab-finance / tab-scenarios / tab-summary / tab-decisions all present (Decision A)
verified_scenarios_C3.reopen_label_split: PASS — label is 'Reopen for editing'; New Version button present on Approved (Decision B)
verified_scenarios_C3.new_version_modal: PASS — opens modal with reason-select + summary-textarea + submit testids (F5)
verified_scenarios_C3.revision_timeline_mount: PASS — mounts in Summary tab right column
verified_scenarios_C3.scenarios_panel_base_v1_anchor: PASS — create-scenario CTAs visible on Base v1
verified_scenarios_C3.scenarios_create_flow: PASS — modal opens, scenario_description posted, modal closes, comparator populated
verified_scenarios_C3.scenario_comparator_mounts: PASS — comparator renders after scenario creation
verified_scenarios_C3.decisions_date_default_europe_london: PASS — date input default = today's London date (Decision E)
verified_scenarios_C3.decisions_supporting_documents_omitted: PASS — no supporting_documents field in form (Decision D)
verified_scenarios_C3.decisions_log_persists: PASS — decision-row-{id} appears post-201 with 'Decision logged' toast
verified_scenarios_C3.nudge_banner_not_dismissible: PASS — no close/dismiss button on nudge-banner (G1)
verified_scenarios_C3.nudge_avatars_ghosts: PASS — 3 ghost slots (threshold=3, decisions=0 at start)
verified_scenarios_C3.nudge_cta_visible_for_approver: PASS — test-admin has appraisals.approve so CTA shown (no nudge-no-perm)
verified_scenarios_C3.nudge_cta_navigation: PASS — clicking CTA navigates to /appraisals/{id}?tab=decisions and tab-decisions becomes data-state=active
verified_scenarios_C3.comparator_empty_state_copy: PASS — testid scenario-comparator-empty wired with GitBranch icon + correct copy

action_items: (P3) Investigate the 401 on /projects/{id} page load — likely a peripheral API (notifications/feed) unrelated to C3, but produces a noisy console error.

(P3) RevisionTimeline: when there is only v1 (no revisions), audit return path so component renders a single empty branch — locator currently matches both [data-testid=revision-timeline] and [data-testid=revision-timeline-empty] (count=2).
(P4) DecisionsTab: when is_current=true but state=Draft, consider hiding the 'Approve the appraisal first…' empty-state copy since the log form is shown anyway (mixed-message).
critical_code_review_comments: All new components are well under 700 lines (largest DecisionsTab.jsx at 444). Atoms are reused appropriately.
decimal.js used correctly for comparator deltas via formatDelta in lib/appraisalMath.js. Intl.NumberFormat en-GB for Money. Europe/London date default via date-fns-tz.
Frontend correctly POSTs scenario_description (matches backend Pydantic) — earlier draft of test was wrong, not the code.
NudgeBanner correctly returns null when nudge.should_show=false (e.g. no Approved appraisal yet). G1 (non-dismissible) holds.
AppraisalPage handles ?tab=decisions URL param and selects/scrolls Decisions tab into view (verified live).
Backend NOT modified during C3 — confirmed; backend-side governance smoke (6/6) green against the new C3 frontend wiring.
test_credentials: test-admin@example.test / TestUser-Dev-2026! — MFA auto-enrolled fresh after seed reset. Cookies (access_token + refresh_token) extracted post-/mfa/enroll/confirm and injected into Playwright context.
seed_data_creation: Project 'TEST_C3_E2E' (id=d1d32c50-03b5-4874-8ade-cad459a4ae3b, code TC3-001) with Base v1 appraisal (id=f5a4bc11-3d8c-4932-8dba-2a7106764510) — submit→approve→log Go decision; 1x Upside scenario sibling created. Group id 04a3bc00-5b1d-4065-9fe5-50d09bdddf5d.
context_for_next_testing_agent: C3 frontend is GREEN. Re-use /app/test_reports/helpers/full_setup.py to obtain fresh cookies + the TEST_C3_E2E project/appraisal/group ids (idempotent — re-runs reset MFA + reuse data). Backend governance smoke is at /app/backend/tests/test_c3_governance_smoke.py and runs in <3s. Two minor cleanup items in action_items are P3/P4 — not blocking. To exercise F5 new-version create→redirect end-to-end, complete the form in NewVersionModal (currently we only verified mount + close); a follow-up assertion on URL change to a new appraisal id is the only flow not asserted here.
